subject: Fw: FREAK-OUT
body:
Just an FYI...

-----Forwarded Message-----
>From: Maemarcia@aol.com
>Sent: Mar 21, 2008 2:18 PM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: FREAK-OUT
>
>Sarah, -
>Going through my e-mails, not been on everyday , and feel so bad I  didn't 
>respond to your last note to me - unlike MARCIA .  Sorry.   SORRY.    
> I  have been  on a whirlwind and just consumed with  figuring things out and 
>tired of putting off the inevitable with my  health, i.e.(back/spine) .   I 
>am as tired of hearing about it as  anybody else and just can't deal with it 
>anymore.  Of all things, I am  actually planning on my surgery.  I only wish I 
>took Jeffrey's info. last  year at this time to go to the CLeveland Clinic in 
>Ohio , but I NEVER, ever  thought I could possibly think of doing this 
>extensive a spinal surgery far away  from home.  I tend to be an      O-C-D   
>personality ;  Oh well,  so what , could be worse, but I like to be  around my things, 
>my bed, my "stuff"  my pillow, etc., as silly as that  might sound.  Truly 
>went to ST. LOUIS, MO  (we know one lawyer and his  wife there as it happens )  
>just to humor one of Bruce's friends from Law  School who lives in Aspen, Lee 
>Pardee  who was visiting with us for a few  days . Coincidentally,  Lee , has 
>a friend who went to this  " well reknowned orthopedic surgeon " -     Dr. 
>KEITH  BRIDWELL -  who totally re-did his recently done, unsuccessful spinal  
>surgery , Titanium rods and all , and Jimmy Trotter , raved about the Doctor  
>(not his personality, but his ability !! )   and MORE-SO    about the facility 
>which is clean,  and doesn't smell and people speak  English and they are 
>efficient and organized , etc.  Robotic , ;  medically a positive, yes ?
>We never intended to so much as consider this and all I worry about  now are 
>the logistics, the distance , the travel (now that could be interesting  !  or 
>painful -  for sure scarey to me )
>yet it appeared many people there to see him were from other states  .  
>That's something i'll have to contend with , but I am nearly  soooooooooo  ready to 
>feel better and to start to have my regular life  back.   Figure I'll deal 
>with the other things, somehow.  Other  than that, anxious, yet, relieved.  Need 
>to go beginning of April for the  "PRE- OP"   and after surgery about 3x  
>over the year.  I'll  make it, because , that's the way it is.  What an 
>impressive surgeon  and according to Lee and Jimmy the bigger problem in surgery now is 
>the high  risk of awful infection  in Hospitals  and BARNES-JEWISH  HOSPITAL 
>CENTER in Missouri has a high/ good rating .  That is a big  issue  also on 
>how we made this monstrous decision.  .
>Anyhow ,  You, my Sarah , and I ,  will have to put off  our SAKS shopping 
>spree and filling your Trish McEvoy carry case , because  I thought we would do 
>it when we came in for the New YOrk meeting  1st   week in May , but I will 
>still have to stay in MO. for about 5  days after surgery and Bruce will go on 
>to the NACDL meeting in NY    without me  (I am planning on having my massage 
>therapist come to stay with  me in this hospital connected Hotel bcs. I am  not 
>allowed to be alone yet  (  (LEFCOURT has organized  the big meeting  and it 
>pisses me off  that I have to miss it!!  )   Anyway , you know I love N.Y. and 
>was  hoping to see you and (my guy) JEFFREY.
>Do me this, fill him in, I know he cares but is just  preoccupied.  Maybe he 
>can look up this Dr. .
>JEE is unbelievably wise and I think will be as impressed  -  with the  
>exception of the distance .
>IMPT>    >>>>
>How is he coping ?   And you ?  Are you dating  and/or happy / content ????   
>  I have so little knowledge  of what is happening now as Bruce is a bit out 
>of the loop , but you know we  talk about it still , and he can always call 
>our  home for anything  .  Caring doesn't stop when you like people.  Wish I 
>could do more for  him and you,too.
>How is your personal life ?  Knew I could write to you (sorry  for the 
>lengthy note...) NOW , please write back to me .  I know Jeffrey  can't deal with 
>e-mail chatter but this is the only way to communicate with you  guys.
>My love, and good wishes, and may the "Spring BUNNY" - whoever he  is be nice 
>to you .
>HUGS
> 
>Marcia M.
>
>
>
>**************Create a Home Theater Like the Pros. Watch the video on AOL 
>Home.      
>(http://home.aol.com/diy/home-improvement-eric-stromer?video=15?ncid=aolhom00030000000001)
body_html:
Just an FYI...

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Maemarcia@aol.com
Sent: Mar 21, 2008 2:18 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: FREAK-OUT

Sarah, -
Going through my e-mails, not been on everyday , and feel so bad I didn't
respond to your last note to me - unlike MARCIA . Sorry. SORRY.
I have been on a whirlwind and just consumed with figuring things out and
tired of putting off the inevitable with my health, i.e.(back/spine) . I
am as tired of hearing about it as anybody else and just can't deal with it
anymore. Of all things, I am actually planning on my surgery. I only wish I
took Jeffrey's info. last year at this time to go to the CLeveland Clinic in
Ohio , but I NEVER, ever thought I could possibly think of doing this
extensive a spinal surgery far away from home. I tend to be an O-C-D
personality ; Oh well, so what , could be worse, but I like to be around my things,
my bed, my "stuff" my pillow, etc., as silly as that might sound. Truly
went to ST. LOUIS, MO (we know one lawyer and his wife there as it happens )
just to humor one of Bruce's friends from Law School who lives in Aspen, Lee
Pardee who was visiting with us for a few days . Coincidentally, Lee , has
a friend who went to this " well reknowned orthopedic surgeon " - Dr.
KEITH BRIDWELL - who totally re-did his recently done, unsuccessful spinal
surgery , Titanium rods and all , and Jimmy Trotter , raved about the Doctor
(not his personality, but his ability !! ) and MORE-SO about the facility
which is clean, and doesn't smell and people speak English and they are
efficient and organized , etc. Robotic , ; medically a positive, yes ?
We never intended to so much as consider this and all I worry about now are
the logistics, the distance , the travel (now that could be interesting ! or
painful - for sure scarey to me )
yet it appeared many people there to see him were from other states .
That's something i'll have to contend with , but I am nearly soooooooooo ready to
feel better and to start to have my regular life back. Figure I'll deal
with the other things, somehow. Other than that, anxious, yet, relieved. Need
to go beginning of April for the "PRE- OP" and after surgery about 3x
over the year. I'll make it, because , that's the way it is. What an
impressive surgeon and according to Lee and Jimmy the bigger problem in surgery now is
the high risk of awful infection in Hospitals and BARNES-JEWISH HOSPITAL
CENTER in Missouri has a high/ good rating . That is a big issue also on
how we made this monstrous decision. .
Anyhow , You, my Sarah , and I , will have to put off our SAKS shopping
spree and filling your Trish McEvoy carry case , because I thought we would do
it when we came in for the New YOrk meeting 1st week in May , but I will
still have to stay in MO. for about 5 days after surgery and Bruce will go on
to the NACDL meeting in NY without me (I am planning on having my massage
therapist come to stay with me in this hospital connected Hotel bcs. I am not
allowed to be alone yet ( (LEFCOURT has organized the big meeting and it
pisses me off that I have to miss it!! ) Anyway , you know I love N.Y. and
was hoping to see you and (my guy) JEFFREY.
Do me this, fill him in, I know he cares but is just preoccupied. Maybe he
can look up this Dr. .
JEE is unbelievably wise and I think will be as impressed - with the
exception of the distance .
IMPT> >>>>
How is he coping ? And you ? Are you dating and/or happy / content ????
I have so little knowledge of what is happening now as Bruce is a bit out
of the loop , but you know we talk about it still , and he can always call
our home for anything . Caring doesn't stop when you like people. Wish I
could do more for him and you,too.
How is your personal life ? Knew I could write to you (sorry for the
lengthy note...) NOW , please write back to me . I know Jeffrey can't deal with
e-mail chatter but this is the only way to communicate with you guys.
My love, and good wishes, and may the "Spring BUNNY" - whoever he is be nice
to you .
HUGS

Marcia M.
